meta.title: Tessera: Daily Word Puzzle
meta.description: A daily word puzzle. Swap tiles on a 4×4 grid until every row spells a word, and every column too. Same puzzle for everyone, every day.
meta.descriptionHard: The harder daily Tessera. Swap tiles on a 5×5 grid until every row, and every column, spells a word. Same puzzle for everyone, every day.

game.demoTipL1: Tap two tiles to swap them
game.demoTipL2: to make a grid of {n} letter words

revealConfirm.title: Give up for today?
revealConfirm.body: The board will snap to the solved grid. Today won’t count toward your streak (your current streak stays as it is).

step1.title: The goal.
step1.body: {wordCount} hidden words: {n} across and {n} down. Find them all to solve today’s puzzle.

step2.title: How you play.
step2.body: Tap two tiles to swap their letters. Each swap counts as one move. Fewer moves earns a higher tier.

step3.title: Reading the board.
step3.dashed: A tile is already on the right row.
step3.green: The row spells a correct word.
step3.complete: All {n} rows are right and the columns spell words too. Tessera solved.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: System follows your device. Light or dark stays on this browser.

language.title: Language
language.description: Changes UI language. Puzzle words stay the same.

hideHints.title: Hide row hints
hideHints.description: Removes the dotted outline that marks tiles already on the right row. Harder mode.

mute.title: Mute
mute.description: Silences the win jingle when you solve the puzzle.

reminder.title: Daily reminders
reminder.description: Push this device when today's puzzle is ready (09:00 UTC). Stays on this device only.
reminder.unsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
reminder.iosNotInstalled: On iPhone, add Tessera to your home screen first, then come back here.
reminder.denied: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in browser settings to opt back in.

history.title: Your Tessera.
history.empty: No puzzles solved yet. Today’s your day.

allPuzzles.empty: No past puzzles yet. Tessera #1 launched today.

email.title: Daily reminder
email.body: One email at 09:00 UTC with today’s puzzle. Unsubscribe whenever.
email.success: Subscribed. We’ll send tomorrow’s grid at 09:00 UTC.
email.error: Something went wrong. Check the address and try again.
email.notConfigured: Reminders aren’t live yet. Come back soon.
email.privacyLeader: We use Loops to send these.

account.title: Account
account.description: Sync your streak and history across devices.
account.modalTitle: Sign in to save your streak
account.modalBody: We'll email you a one-time code. Your streak and history then follow you to any device.
account.codePrompt: Enter the code we sent to {email}.
account.codeError: That code didn't work. Check it and try again.
account.error: Something went wrong. Check the address and try again.

start.tagline: Swap tiles until every row spells the correct word.

installIOS.title: Add Tessera to your home screen
installIOS.body: Tap the share icon, then choose Add to Home Screen. Opens in one tap, and you can turn on a daily reminder.

installAndroid.title: Install Tessera
installAndroid.body: Add it to your home screen for one-tap daily play.
